name: ARACHNOID CYST OF SPINE

demographics.Histo: lined with fibrous tissue + scattered meningothelial cells
demographics.Age: 15-45 years (in 77%); range of several months to 80 years; M=F

dominant_finding: variability in signal intensity ← pulsatility of CSF / higher protein content
discriminating_features: filling with intrathecal contrast material depending upon size of opening between cyst +
local displacement + compression of spinal cord
higher SI than CSF (from relative lack of CSF pulsations)

general: filling with intrathecal contrast material depending upon size of opening between cyst +
local displacement + compression of spinal cord
higher SI than CSF (from relative lack of CSF pulsations)
MR: iso- to hyperintense to CSF on T1WI + T2WI
variability in signal intensity ← pulsatility of CSF / higher protein content
isointense to CSF on FLAIR MR images
focal displacement and compression of spinal cord
widened dorsal subarachnoid space with diminished CSF flow artifact

clinical.Cx: spinal cord myelopathy, nerve root radiculopathy
